name: The 'log_min_duration_statement' database flag for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance is set to '-1' (disabled)
query: { cloudSqlInstances( where: { engine: { eq: "postgresql" } cloudProvider: { eq: "gcp" } dbFlags_SOME: { name: { eq: "log_min_duration_statement" }, NOT: { value: { eq: "-1" } } } } ) { ...AssetFragment }}
